ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airlines" (
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airline */,
  "airline_name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the airline */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the airline was founded */,
  "fleet_size" INTEGER /* Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airline's website */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airline */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airline_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "code" TEXT /* Airport code (e.g., BLR, DEL) */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the airport's website */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the airport */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email address for the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight */,
  "journey_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight */,
  "dep_time" TEXT /* Departure time */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Arrival time */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the schedule (e.g., On Time, Delayed, Cancelled) */,
  "gate_number" TEXT /* Gate number for the flight */,
  "terminal" TEXT /* Terminal number for the flight */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the booking was made */,
  "travel_date" TEXT /* Date of travel */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the customer */,
  "class_type" TEXT /* Class type of the seat (e.g., Economy, Business, First Class) */,
  "fare_type" TEXT /* Type of fare (e.g., Standard, Promo, Last Minute) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, Debit Card, PayPal) */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Unique ticket number for the booking */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the booking */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number of the customer */,
  "frequent_flyer_number" TEXT /* Frequent flyer number of the customer */,
  "preferred_airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer's preferred airline */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_airline_id") REFERENCES airlines ("airline_id")
)
column_names: Number of aircraft in the airline's fleet
Contact phone number for the airline
Contact email address for the airline
Elevation of the airport in meters
Contact phone number for the airport
Contact email address for the airport

Method of payment used (e.g., Credit Card, Debit Card, PayPal)
